commands.title: /say
commands.description: Sends a message to the public chat.

commands.title: /tell
commands.description: Sends a private message to specific players.

commands.title: /tellraw
commands.breakdown: Supports colors, translations, player names, and scoreboard values.

commands.title: /title
commands.description: Shows text on the player's screen HUD.
commands.breakdown: title = center big. subtitle = below title. actionbar = above hotbar.

commands.title: /hud
commands.breakdown: element = paperdoll, armor, tooltips, all, etc. Great for cutscenes.

commands.title: /me
commands.description: Sends an action message in the third person.

commands.title: /msg
commands.description: Alias for /tell; sends a private message.

commands.title: /w
commands.description: Short alias for /whisper; sends a private message.
